title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has processed 6 community reports today. Here is a summary of outcomes:

**Bans (2)**
- A user was permanently banned for coordinated phishing link spam posted across 6 channels within 20 minutes. This constitutes a clear and immediate threat to community safety.
- A second user was permanently banned for a sustained pattern of targeted harassment directed at newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- One new member received a formal warning for an off-topic post in #introductions. We encourage everyone to review our channel guidelines.
- One account received a warning for suspicious repeated automated-style replies in help channels. This account remains under review.

**No Action Taken (2)**
- One report against a trusted community helper was filed during a moderation disagreement. A single disputed accusation is not sufficient grounds for action; this has been flagged for senior human moderator review.
- One high-severity report against a core maintainer was determined to be a coordinated false-positive filing by brigading users following a legitimate moderation decision. No action was taken; brigading reports are themselves a violation of community policy.

We remain committed to a fair, transparent, and proportionate moderation process. If you have questions or concerns about any of these decisions, please reach out to the moderation team directly.

— Community Operations
